name: developers-universe-1/mcp-demand-engine
description: MCP-native demand generation: LinkedIn signals, ICP scoring, and CRM routing.

tools.name: detect_signals
tools.description: Monitor LinkedIn engagement signals: likes, comments, reposts, profile views, mentions.

tools.name: score_icp
tools.description: Score every engager 0-100 against your ICP with configurable title/industry/company-size filters.

tools.name: enrich_contact
tools.description: Get verified email and direct dial via Apollo and Clearbit.

tools.name: route_to_crm
tools.description: Ship qualified leads straight to Salesforce or HubSpot with campaign tags.

tools.name: get_watchlist
tools.description: Get monitored profiles with follower counts and qualified-lead attribution.
